move_extent: ~7 pts (738 → 745 primary leg); secondary leg 745 → 750 adds 5 pts
completion_signal: 15-min close above 740 with call vol/OI stabilizing at 736-738 — GEX flips positive at 740, confirms stop-hunt resolved and expansion underway
manipulation_tell: Call vol/OI 4278%/5231%/4819% at 736/737/738 (at-spot and below) while NQ futures print -0.24% AGAINST confirmed Iran deal — weakness against bullish-news with broad call loading across 3 consecutive strikes is the textbook dealer stop-hunt tell; fresh flow OPPOSITE to the overnight futures move = manipulation

reversal_zones.note: 58% board score; likely stop-hunt terminus — massive call accumulation at 732-738 makes this the expected manip-dip floor before real reversal
GEX flips to positive (+76.9M) at this strike; 52% board score — 15-min close above here triggers the confirmed expansion leg toward 745
Secondary gamma shelf (-99.3M GEX), 27% board score — secondary floor if the opening shake-out overshoots 732
Major put wall (-300.4M GEX), 20% board score — ultimate backstop in a true breakdown; not the base case given COT extreme short and Iran bid

summary: Macro bias is bullish (+35): the dominant catalyst is the US-Iran 60-day roadmap signed in Switzerland and confirmed by NPR, CNBC, Al Jazeera, and Fox News — IAEA inspectors return, Strait-of-Hormuz deconfliction agreed, and the US Treasury issued a 60-day Iranian oil sanctions waiver, collectively deflating the geopolitical risk premium that has been sitting under NQ. COT is at the 2nd percentile (historically maximum crowded-short, extreme squeeze potential) and USD/JPY rising to 161.6 keeps the carry trade intact. Headwinds are structural-slow: TGA +$52.6B and RRP +$3.67B both tightening net liquidity, 10Y yield +5.8bps without 2Y follow-through adding mild duration pressure. Open type is manip_down_real_up: QQQ spot (738.115) is pinned at the 738 major put wall and gamma flip (737.5), where the largest GEX node in the chain (-596.1M) creates an explosive amplifier in a negative GEX regime. The manipulation tell is unambiguous — call vol/OI of 4278%/5231%/4819% at 736/737/738 (at and below spot) shows massive call accumulation into dealer-driven weakness, while NQ futures are printing -0.24% AGAINST the confirmed Iran de-escalation; price fighting positive DEX (+4,751.9M) and loading calls into three consecutive strikes below spot is the canonical stop-hunt setup. Expect Monday's open to probe 732 (58% board score, highest-probability stop-hunt terminus); once 740 reclaims on a 15-min close (GEX turns positive, 52% board resistance), the true expansion leg is confirmed toward 745 (GEX +150.9M) then the 750 call wall (GEX +273.5M, ~12 pts total from current spot). Day is choppy through the initial phase given negative net GEX amplifying swings and VIX at 17.28; clean trending only after 740 holds on a close.
